properties.name: auth.jwt.issuer
properties.description: JWT issuer claim value.

properties.name: auth.jwt.expiration-seconds
properties.description: JWT access token validity duration in seconds.

properties.name: auth.refresh-token.expiration-seconds
properties.description: Refresh token validity duration in seconds.

properties.name: auth.jwt.secret
properties.description: Base64 encoded HMAC secret for signing JWT tokens.

properties.name: app.oauth2.success-redirect-url
properties.description: Frontend redirect URL for successful Google OAuth2 login.

properties.name: auth.user-profile-cache.ttl-seconds
properties.description: User profile cache validity duration in seconds.

properties.name: auth.forgot-password.otp-ttl-seconds
properties.description: Forgot-password OTP validity duration in seconds.

properties.name: auth.forgot-password.rate-limit.forgot-max-attempts
properties.description: Maximum forgot-password OTP requests allowed in one rate-limit window per email.

properties.name: auth.forgot-password.rate-limit.forgot-window-seconds
properties.description: Rate-limit window (seconds) for forgot-password OTP requests.

properties.name: auth.forgot-password.rate-limit.verify-max-attempts
properties.description: Maximum OTP verification attempts allowed in one rate-limit window per email.

properties.name: auth.forgot-password.rate-limit.verify-window-seconds
properties.description: Rate-limit window (seconds) for OTP verification attempts.

properties.name: auth.forgot-password.rate-limit.resend-max-attempts
properties.description: Maximum OTP resend requests allowed in one rate-limit window per email.

properties.name: auth.forgot-password.rate-limit.resend-window-seconds
properties.description: Rate-limit window (seconds) for OTP resend requests.

properties.name: auth.notification.exchange
properties.description: RabbitMQ topic exchange for notification events.

properties.name: auth.notification.email-otp-routing-key
properties.description: Routing key for forgot-password OTP notification messages.

properties.name: auth.notification.email-queue
properties.description: Queue name that receives email notification events.

properties.name: auth.notification.email-account-locked-routing-key
properties.description: A description for 'auth.notification.email-account-locked-routing-key'

properties.name: minio.access-key
properties.description: A description for 'minio.access-key'

properties.name: minio.url
properties.description: A description for 'minio.url'

properties.name: minio.secret-key
properties.description: A description for 'minio.secret-key'

properties.name: minio.bucket-name
properties.description: A description for 'minio.bucket-name'

properties.name: auth.notification.email-account-unlocked-routing-key
properties.description: A description for 'auth.notification.email-account-unlocked-routing-key'

properties.name: auth.email-verification.otp-ttl-seconds
properties.description: A description for 'auth.email-verification.otp-ttl-seconds'
